mapper.select: select id as versionId, version_label as versionLabel, version_no as versionNo, version_level as versionLevel, version_reason as versionReason, template_code as templateCode, template_version as templateVersion, is_current as isCurrent, change_summary as changeSummary, created_at as createdAt, published_at as publishedAt from t1_dossier_version where dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} order by version_no desc

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when node_level = 2 then 1 else 0 end) as systemCount, sum(case when node_level = 3 then 1 else 0 end) as subsystemCount, sum(case when node_level = 4 then 1 else 0 end) as equipmentCount, sum(case when node_level = 5 then 1 else 0 end) as componentCount, sum(case when node_level >= 6 then 1 else 0 end) as partCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node where aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and is_active = 1

select abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.parent_id is null and abn.is_active = 1 order by abn.node_level, abn.position_code limit 1

select abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.id = #{nodeId}

select abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.is_active = 1
and abn.parent_id = #{parentId}
and abn.parent_id is null
order by abn.node_level, abn.position_code, abn.part_number limit 200

select abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.is_active = 1 and ( abn.part_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.part_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.serial_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.position_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.ata_chapter like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by case when abn.part_number = #{keyword} then 0 else 1 end, abn.node_level, abn.part_number limit 60

with recursive bom_path as ( select abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount, 0 as depth from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.id = #{nodeId} union all select p.id as nodeId, p.parent_id as parentId, p.aircraft_id as aircraftId, p.node_level as nodeLevel, p.node_type as nodeType, p.part_number as partNumber, p.part_name as partName, p.serial_number as serialNumber, p.position_code as positionCode, p.ata_chapter as ataChapter, p.manufacturer, p.install_date as installDate, p.tsn_fh as tsnFh, p.tsn_fc as tsnFc, p.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = p.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount, bp.depth + 1 as depth from t1_aircraft_bom_node p inner join bom_path bp on bp.parentId = p.id ) select * from bom_path order by depth desc

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when object_level = 'system' then 1 else 0 end) as systemCount, sum(case when object_level = 'subsystem' then 1 else 0 end) as subsystemCount, sum(case when object_level = 'equipment' then 1 else 0 end) as equipmentCount, sum(case when object_level = 'component' then 1 else 0 end) as componentCount, sum(case when object_level = 'part' then 1 else 0 end) as partCount from t1_dossier_structure_node where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and node_kind != 'chapter' and chapter_status = 'normal' and bom_node_id is not null

select sn.bom_node_id as nodeId, sn.parent_bom_node_id as parentId, sn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, case sn.object_level when 'aircraft' then 1 when 'system' then 2 when 'subsystem' then 3 when 'equipment' then 4 when 'component' then 5 else 6 end as nodeLevel, upper(sn.object_level) as nodeType, sn.bom_node_code as partNumber, sn.name as partName, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) as serialNumber, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) as positionCode, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) as ataChapter, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.manufacturer')) as manufacturer, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.installDate')) as installDate, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFh')) as tsnFh, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFc')) as tsnFc, sn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node c where c.dossier_version_id = sn.dossier_version_id and c.parent_bom_node_id = sn.bom_node_id and c.node_kind != 'chapter' and c.chapter_status = 'normal' and c.bom_node_id is not null) as childCount from t1_dossier_structure_node sn where sn.dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and sn.parent_bom_node_id is null and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' and sn.bom_node_id is not null order by sn.sort_order, sn.code limit 1

select sn.bom_node_id as nodeId, sn.parent_bom_node_id as parentId, sn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, case sn.object_level when 'aircraft' then 1 when 'system' then 2 when 'subsystem' then 3 when 'equipment' then 4 when 'component' then 5 else 6 end as nodeLevel, upper(sn.object_level) as nodeType, sn.bom_node_code as partNumber, sn.name as partName, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) as serialNumber, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) as positionCode, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) as ataChapter, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.manufacturer')) as manufacturer, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.installDate')) as installDate, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFh')) as tsnFh, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFc')) as tsnFc, sn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node c where c.dossier_version_id = sn.dossier_version_id and c.parent_bom_node_id = sn.bom_node_id and c.node_kind != 'chapter' and c.chapter_status = 'normal' and c.bom_node_id is not null) as childCount from t1_dossier_structure_node sn where sn.dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and sn.bom_node_id = #{bomNodeId} and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' order by sn.sort_order, sn.code limit 1

select sn.bom_node_id as nodeId, sn.parent_bom_node_id as parentId, sn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, case sn.object_level when 'aircraft' then 1 when 'system' then 2 when 'subsystem' then 3 when 'equipment' then 4 when 'component' then 5 else 6 end as nodeLevel, upper(sn.object_level) as nodeType, sn.bom_node_code as partNumber, sn.name as partName, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) as serialNumber, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) as positionCode, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) as ataChapter, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.manufacturer')) as manufacturer, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.installDate')) as installDate, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFh')) as tsnFh, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFc')) as tsnFc, sn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node c where c.dossier_version_id = sn.dossier_version_id and c.parent_bom_node_id = sn.bom_node_id and c.node_kind != 'chapter' and c.chapter_status = 'normal' and c.bom_node_id is not null) as childCount from t1_dossier_structure_node sn where sn.dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' and sn.bom_node_id is not null
and sn.parent_bom_node_id = #{parentId}
and sn.parent_bom_node_id is null
order by sn.sort_order, sn.code

select sn.bom_node_id as nodeId, sn.parent_bom_node_id as parentId, sn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, case sn.object_level when 'aircraft' then 1 when 'system' then 2 when 'subsystem' then 3 when 'equipment' then 4 when 'component' then 5 else 6 end as nodeLevel, upper(sn.object_level) as nodeType, sn.bom_node_code as partNumber, sn.name as partName, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) as serialNumber, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) as positionCode, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) as ataChapter, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.manufacturer')) as manufacturer, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.installDate')) as installDate, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFh')) as tsnFh, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFc')) as tsnFc, sn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node c where c.dossier_version_id = sn.dossier_version_id and c.parent_bom_node_id = sn.bom_node_id and c.node_kind != 'chapter' and c.chapter_status = 'normal' and c.bom_node_id is not null) as childCount from t1_dossier_structure_node sn where sn.dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' and sn.bom_node_id is not null and ( sn.bom_node_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or sn.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by case when sn.bom_node_code = #{keyword} then 0 else 1 end, sn.sort_order, sn.code limit 60

with recursive bom_path as ( select sn.bom_node_id as nodeId, sn.parent_bom_node_id as parentId, sn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, case sn.object_level when 'aircraft' then 1 when 'system' then 2 when 'subsystem' then 3 when 'equipment' then 4 when 'component' then 5 else 6 end as nodeLevel, upper(sn.object_level) as nodeType, sn.bom_node_code as partNumber, sn.name as partName, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) as serialNumber, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) as positionCode, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) as ataChapter, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.manufacturer')) as manufacturer, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.installDate')) as installDate, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFh')) as tsnFh, json_unquote(json_extract(sn.attrs_json, '$.tsnFc')) as tsnFc, sn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node c where c.dossier_version_id = sn.dossier_version_id and c.parent_bom_node_id = sn.bom_node_id and c.node_kind != 'chapter' and c.chapter_status = 'normal' and c.bom_node_id is not null) as childCount, 0 as depth from t1_dossier_structure_node sn where sn.dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and sn.bom_node_id = #{bomNodeId} and sn.node_kind != 'chapter' and sn.chapter_status = 'normal' union all select p.bom_node_id as nodeId, p.parent_bom_node_id as parentId, p.aircraft_id as aircraftId, case p.object_level when 'aircraft' then 1 when 'system' then 2 when 'subsystem' then 3 when 'equipment' then 4 when 'component' then 5 else 6 end as nodeLevel, upper(p.object_level) as nodeType, p.bom_node_code as partNumber, p.name as partName, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.serialNumber')) as serialNumber, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.positionCode')) as positionCode, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.ataChapter')) as ataChapter, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.manufacturer')) as manufacturer, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.installDate')) as installDate, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.tsnFh')) as tsnFh, json_unquote(json_extract(p.attrs_json, '$.tsnFc')) as tsnFc, p.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_dossier_structure_node c where c.dossier_version_id = p.dossier_version_id and c.parent_bom_node_id = p.bom_node_id and c.node_kind != 'chapter' and c.chapter_status = 'normal' and c.bom_node_id is not null) as childCount, bp.depth + 1 as depth from t1_dossier_structure_node p inner join bom_path bp on bp.parentId = p.bom_node_id where p.dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and p.node_kind != 'chapter' and p.chapter_status = 'normal' ) select * from bom_path order by depth desc

select id as structureNodeId, dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dossier_version_id as versionId, aircraft_id as aircraftId, bom_node_id as bomNodeId, parent_bom_node_id as parentBomNodeId, bom_node_code as bomNodeCode, object_level as objectLevel, part_instance_id as partInstanceId, parent_id as parentId, node_kind as nodeKind, code, name, node_path as nodePath, sort_order as sortOrder, chapter_status as chapterStatus, completeness_status as completenessStatus, content_count as contentCount, missing_count as missingCount, required_flag as requiredFlag, cast(attrs_json as char) as attrsJson, cast(source_trace_json as char) as sourceTraceJson from t1_dossier_structure_node where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} and bom_node_id = #{bomNodeId} order by sort_order limit 1

select id as structureNodeId, bom_node_id as bomNodeId, parent_bom_node_id as parentBomNodeId, bom_node_code as bomNodeCode, object_level as objectLevel, node_kind as nodeKind, code, name, node_path as nodePath, completeness_status as completenessStatus, content_count as contentCount, missing_count as missingCount, cast(attrs_json as char) as attrsJson, cast(source_trace_json as char) as sourceTraceJson from t1_dossier_structure_node where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} order by sort_order, code

select id as documentEntryId, structure_node_id as structureNodeId, doc_no as docNo, title, file_storage_key as fileStorageKey, source_system as sourceSystem, source_table as sourceTable, source_record_key as sourceRecordKey, document_status as documentStatus, completeness_status as completenessStatus, required_flag as requiredFlag, included_flag as includedFlag, cast(source_trace_json as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(attrs_json as char) as attrsJson from t1_document_entry where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} order by required_flag desc, title

select sourceSystem, sourceTable, sum(recordCount) as recordCount from ( select source_system as sourceSystem, source_table as sourceTable, count(1) as recordCount from t1_dossier_content_item where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} group by source_system, source_table union all select source_system as sourceSystem, source_table as sourceTable, count(1) as recordCount from t1_document_entry where dossier_version_id = #{versionId} group by source_system, source_table ) t where sourceSystem is not null group by sourceSystem, sourceTable order by recordCount desc, sourceSystem
